name: Montego Bags O' Wags Dog Treats – Dental Sticks 500g
shortDescription: Montego Bags O’ Wags Dental Sticks 120g are highly nutritious, butternut-flavoured dog treats designed to promote dental health while providing a tasty and rewarding chew for adult dogs. Not suitable for puppies.
description: Give your dog a wagtastically delicious and nutritious treat that supports oral health! Montego BAGS O’ WAGS Dental Sticks are firm, chewtastically satisfying snacks specially crafted for adult dogs, especially larger breeds. Featuring a naturally sweet butternut flavour that dogs love, these treats help reduce plaque and tartar build-up, promote gum health, and freshen breath. Perfect as a daily reward, training incentive, or between-meal snack, they complement any Montego dry or wet food diet. Key Features: Flavour: Butternut is naturally sweet and highly appealing Size & Weight: 500g value packs for larger dogs Dental Benefits: Helps clean teeth, reduce tartar, and support healthy gums Versatile Use: Ideal for training, rewarding good behaviour, or daily snacks Complements Montego Diets: Perfect alongside Montego dry or wet food meals Ingredients & Nutritional Info: Corn starch, chicken meal, water, glycerine, milk powder (lactose reduced), wheat gluten, propylene glycol, sugars, poultry fat, dehydrated butternut and carrots, sodium hexametaphosphate, fish oil. Additives (/kg): Sensory: Meat-based enhancers with chicken aroma, orange colourant; Preservatives: Potassium sorbate. Nutrient Amount Crude Protein 12.5% Total Fat 5.5% Crude Fibre 0.5% Moisture 18.5% Omega-6 fatty acids 1.5% Omega-3 fatty acids 0.3% Sugars 2.5% Metabolizable Energy 342kcal/100 g Treat your dog to a healthy chew that’s full of yummy goodness and supports their smile every day!
